title: Basic JavaScript Template Literals
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Template Literals. Focus on implementing Template literal syntax correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Template Literals
description: Create a function that uses Template literal syntax and Expression interpolation together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Template Literals Project
description: Build a small application that applies Template literal syntax, Expression interpolation, Multi-line strings (no \n) in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Template Literals
description: The following code has bugs related to Template literal syntax. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Template Literals
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Template literal syntax and Expression interpolation.
